character.name: Ellen Harwick
character.prompt: create a new character in the same size, fidelity, style, and vibe to those already created that I tagged with "Smoke & Honey." The character you're making is Dr. Ellen Harwick (Extension Agent). Her description in the GDD is: Cedar Bend State University Extension agent for Millhaven County. Expert in integrated pest management and Midwest apiculture. Give her a "pretty field scientist" vibe.
